title: AGENTOBS AgentRunPayload
description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Root-level summary payload emitted when a complete multi-step agent run resolves. Used with event type: llm.trace.agent.completed. Aggregates total token usage and costs across all steps. agent_run_id MUST be the same stable identifier used across all AgentStepPayload events for this run.

agent_run_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Stable identifier for this agent run. MUST be identical to the agent_run_id in all AgentStepPayload events belonging to this run.

agent_name.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Human-readable identifier for the agent type or instance.

trace_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — W3C Trace Context-compatible trace ID. Identifies the entire agent run's span tree. Exactly 32 lowercase hexadecimal characters.

root_span_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — The root span that contains all child step spans. All AgentStepPayload.parent_span_id values at the top level of the run MUST reference this span ID.

total_steps.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Total number of agent iteration steps completed in this run.

total_model_calls.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Total number of individual LLM API calls made across all steps.

total_tool_calls.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Total number of tool invocations across all steps.

total_token_usage.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Aggregated token usage summed across all model calls in the run.

total_cost.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Aggregated cost summed across all model calls in the run.

status.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Overall run outcome. 'max_steps_exceeded' indicates the agent was force-terminated by a step count guard.

start_time_unix_nano.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Run start time as Unix epoch nanoseconds. Should match the start_time_unix_nano of step 0.

end_time_unix_nano.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Run end time as Unix epoch nanoseconds. MUST be ≥ start_time_unix_nano.

duration_ms.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Total run duration in milliseconds. MUST equal (end_time_unix_nano - start_time_unix_nano) / 1_000_000 within ±1 ms.

termination_reason.description: RFC-0001 §8.5 — Human-readable explanation of why the agent run ended. Especially useful when status is 'error', 'timeout', or 'max_steps_exceeded'.
examples: Max steps (10) exceeded without reaching a final answer
Tool returned unrecoverable error at step 3
